summary: Incomplete deliverable with critical gaps: (1) Workflow references ./Invoke-TestResultsAggregator.Tests.ps1 and fixture files that are not provided—workflow cannot execute. (2) Two implementations exist (Invoke-TestResultsAggregator.ps1 + src/Aggregate-TestResults.ps1) with different designs, creating confusion and maintenance risk. (3) Test harnesses expect conflicting totals (9 vs 13 tests), suggesting mismatched fixtures or specifications. (4) No Set-StrictMode in main script; inconsistent error handling. (5) Task requires all tests pass via Pester and act, but test file and fixtures are absent—stated requirement "must pass at the end" cannot be verified. Code patterns are reasonable but duplication and missing components make this unshippable.
